creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

I'm really sorry this ticket has been unattended for all these years. I've simply missed it.

Now about the suggested change. One could argue that deamon(8) shouldn't manage the logging but rather this should be handled by telegraf itself, using the agent.logfile configuration directives. I don't see the point running logging the way it is done now. Please argue against this standpoint. :)

Palle
